scenario: Iran War Transition - Risk On Positioning

positions.thesis: Cash equivalent - dry powder for volatility. 4% yield while waiting.
AI infrastructure backbone. VMware integration exceeding expectations. Custom silicon leadership for hyperscalers.
positions.invalidation: ASIC demand slows. VMware integration struggles. Hyperscaler insourcing accelerates.

positions.thesis: Quality compounder. AI integration strengthening search monopoly. Antitrust breakup could unlock $500B hidden value.
positions.invalidation: DOJ breakup destroys value. Gemini revenue <$2B. Search revenue declines YoY.

positions.thesis: Contrarian value. 11.8x forward PE for 14% EPS growth. Alt asset secular tailwinds. Credit concerns overblown.
positions.invalidation: Net inflows turn negative. 10Y >5%. Private market valuations correct 20%+.

positions.thesis: Cheap defensive. Best-run MCO at 11x forward. Medicare Advantage headwinds priced in. 3.1% dividend yield.
positions.invalidation: MA rate cuts >2%. DOJ antitrust escalates. Medical costs spike 300bps above guidance.

positions.thesis: Protein nutrition category growth. Premier Protein brand strength. 9x EBITDA vs peers at 20x.
positions.invalidation: Consumer shift away from protein. Input cost spike. Competitive moat erodes.

positions.thesis: TRIMMED from 5% to 2.5%. Broken momentum but Jira/Confluence sticky enterprise. Preserve optionality for recovery.
positions.invalidation: Enterprise churn accelerates. GitHub Copilot disrupts dev tools. Cloud growth stalls.
positions.trim_reason: Broken momentum. 4/4 superinvestors recommended cut. CIO decision.

positions.thesis: Sports betting infrastructure. IMG Arena acquisition transformative. 23-25% revenue growth guide.
positions.invalidation: Sports betting regulation tightens. Major league data deal lost. Growth decelerates.

positions.thesis: TRIMMED from 5% to 2.5%. Dead money without catalyst but WAKIX blockbuster at 9x earnings. Keep small for optionality.
positions.invalidation: Generic competition emerges. FDA issues. Pipeline failures.
positions.trim_reason: Biotech Desk says trim. Dead money without catalyst. CIO decision.

positions.thesis: Portfolio hedge. Uncorrelated to equities. Loses safe-haven bid if war ends but provides tail risk protection.
positions.invalidation: Peace deal. Fed hawkishness. Dollar surge.

positions.thesis: TRIMMED from 7.5% to 5%. Bear steepener underway, fighting Fed and fiscal reality. Reduced duration exposure per Darwinian debate.
positions.trim_reason: Darwinian debate: 5.85 combined weight (Yield Curve 2.05, Druckenmiller 1.9, Bond Desk 1.25, Central Bank 0.65) vs CIO 0.30. Bear steepener confirmed.

positions.thesis: SIZED UP from 5% to 8%. Energy hedge for Iran war. Strongest consensus in Darwinian debate (8.95 weight). Strait of Hormuz risk underpriced.
positions.invalidation: Peace deal collapses oil. Strait stays open. Global recession.
positions.add_reason: Darwinian debate: 8.95 combined weight (Geopolitical 2.5, Commodities 2.35, Energy 2.2, Druckenmiller 1.9). Strongest consensus signal.

positions.thesis: NEW POSITION. AI GPU #2, MI300X ramping, hyperscaler diversification from NVDA. -40% from highs. Institutional accumulation Monday.
positions.invalidation: MI300X loses hyperscaler share. NVDA maintains dominance. AI capex slowdown.

positions.thesis: NEW POSITION. Defense spending surge from Iran war. Pratt & Whitney GTF issues resolving. $206B backlog. Fills industrials gap.
positions.invalidation: Defense budget cuts. GTF issues resurface. Margin compression.

closed_positions.thesis: CLOSED. Small-cap short was wrong side of Fed pivot trade. 4/4 superinvestors said cover.
closed_positions.close_reason: Unanimous superinvestor consensus to cover. Fed pivot = small cap rally. Correlation risk with APO.

closed_positions.thesis: CLOSED. HDD obsolescence thesis broke as AI storage narrative shifted bullish. Short squeeze risk elevated.
closed_positions.close_reason: Unanimous Darwinian consensus to cover. 7.5 combined weight. Position bleeding -9.4%. AI storage narrative shift invalidated HDD obsolescence thesis.

key_changes: Covered IWM short - wrong side of macro
Covered STX short @ $385.97 - thesis broke, AI storage narrative shifted (7.5 combined weight unanimous)
Trimmed TLT 7.5% to 5% @ $87.30 - bear steepener underway (5.85 weight vs CIO 0.30)
Added XLE 5% to 8% @ $56.82 - strongest Darwinian consensus (8.95 combined weight)
